# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| main    | ✅ Yes    |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Do NOT open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.**

Report security issues privately via email: **carlos@gnosiq.ai**

Include:
- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact
- Suggested fix (optional)

**Response time:** 48 hours acknowledgment · 7 days resolution target

## Scope

- gnosiq.ai API endpoints
- Authentication and authorization logic
- Data handling and privacy (LGPD/GDPR)
- Third-party integrations (GCP, Vercel)

## Out of Scope

- Issues in third-party dependencies (report upstream)
- Theoretical attacks without proof of concept
- Social engineering
